proposals.title: Parallel developer+reviewer shortens small tasks
proposals.context_md: Applies when complexity_score < 5 and phase is implementation or refactor.
proposals.approach_md: Two agent_start events (developer, reviewer) within the same timestamp bucket. Both agent_stop outcome: success with turns_used 8 and 5. orchestration_complete outcome: success, zero replan_triggered. total_cost_usd 0.03, duration_ms 35000.
